ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_CHEST_CHOOSE.title: Persona Chest
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_CHEST_CHOOSE.descr: Use only outside combat. Randomly reveal 4 different persona relics you do not own. Choose 1 to obtain.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-PERSON_CHEST_CHOOSE.selec: Choose a persona relic to obtain
ASTRALPARTYMOD-CANDY_SUPPORT_GUM.title: Candy: Support Gum
ASTRALPARTYMOD-CANDY_SUPPORT_GUM.descrip: Use on any player. The target heals [blue]6[/blue] HP, gains {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, and removes [gold]Doom[/gold].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-CANDY_ENERGY_SUPPLEMENT_B: Use only on a player with [gold]Modification[/gold]. The target gains [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Modification[/gold], [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold], [blue]3[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red], and [blue]2[/blue] temporary [green]Dexterity[/green] for [blue]2[/blue] turns.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-CANDY_BIG_BRAIN_GUMMY.des: Use on any player. The target draws [blue]3[/blue] cards, then removes [gold]Modification[/gold] and [gold]Doom[/gold].
